meta.title: OXP | Oyster Shell Pellets, Premium Tableware, and Material Supply
meta.description: OXP is a South Korean oyster shell material company creating pellets, compress-moulded tableware, and premium home objects.

footer.description: Oyster shell pellets and finished objects from South Korea, shaped for premium retail, hospitality, and material partnerships.

privacy.metaDescription: How OXP collects, uses, stores, and shares information across the website, store, community, and B2B inquiry flows.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: This policy explains how OXP handles information from visitors, customers, community members, and business contacts. It is written as a general commercial website policy and should be reviewed before production launch.

sections.title: Introduction
paragraphs: We respect your privacy and aim to handle personal information in a clear, practical, and limited way. This policy applies when you use the OXP website, storefront, community features, checkout, contact forms, or B2B inquiry forms.

sections.title: Who we are
paragraphs: OXP is a commercial website for oyster shell material, finished objects, community submissions, and business inquiries. References to OXP, we, us, or our mean the website operator responsible for this service.

sections.title: Information we collect
paragraphs: We collect information you provide directly, information generated by your use of the website, and limited technical information needed to operate, protect, and improve the service.

sections.title: Account information
paragraphs: If you create an account, we may collect your name, email address, password credentials, profile details, saved addresses, order history, and account activity. Passwords are handled through the authentication system and are not intended to be visible to our team.

sections.title: Order and checkout information
paragraphs: When you place an order request, we collect details needed to review stock, calculate delivery, contact you, and complete the manual payment process. This can include your email, name, phone number, delivery address, order items, selected shipping method, and customer notes.

sections.title: Guest checkout information
paragraphs: Guest checkout does not require an account. We collect your email and checkout details so we can send order updates, confirm manual payment steps, and provide access to your guest order status through a secure order link.

sections.title: Community content and uploaded files
paragraphs: If you use community features, we may collect posts, comments, profile content, reports, likes, favorites, follows, and uploaded files. Public submissions may be displayed on the website after any applicable moderation.

sections.title: B2B inquiry information
paragraphs: For B2B inquiries, material requests, product development requests, and contact forms, we collect the business contact details and project information you submit so the team can respond and assess the opportunity.

sections.title: Cookies and analytics
paragraphs: We may use cookies, local storage, session identifiers, and analytics tools to keep carts working, maintain login sessions, understand website performance, and protect the service. Browser controls may allow you to limit some cookies, but core site features may need them to function.

sections.title: How we use information
paragraphs: We use information to provide the website, manage accounts, operate the cart and checkout, process order requests, respond to inquiries, moderate community activity, troubleshoot issues, improve content, prevent abuse, and comply with operational obligations.

sections.title: How we share information
paragraphs: We share information only as needed with service providers, hosting providers, storage providers, delivery or fulfillment partners, professional advisers, and authorities where required. We do not sell personal information as a standalone business activity.

sections.title: Data storage and security
paragraphs: We use reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect information, including access controls and encrypted handling for sensitive runtime settings. No website can guarantee absolute security, so please use strong passwords and contact us if you believe your account or order link has been exposed.

sections.title: International service providers
paragraphs: The website may use service providers located in other countries. Where information is processed internationally, it may be subject to the laws and operational practices of those locations.

sections.title: User rights and access/correction requests
paragraphs: You may contact us to request access to, correction of, or deletion of personal information associated with you. We may need to verify your identity and may retain information where needed for legitimate business, security, legal, or recordkeeping reasons.

sections.title: Data retention
paragraphs: We keep information only for as long as reasonably needed for the purposes described in this policy, including order records, customer support, business follow-up, security, moderation, accounting, and legal recordkeeping.

sections.title: Children's privacy
paragraphs: This website is intended for general commercial audiences and is not directed to children. If you believe a child has provided personal information, contact us so we can review and take appropriate action.

sections.title: Contact details
paragraphs: Privacy questions and access or correction requests can be sent through the website contact page or to the contact email shown in the footer.

sections.title: Changes to this policy
paragraphs: We may update this policy as the website, store, community, and business operations evolve. The updated version will be posted on this page with a revised last updated date.

terms.metaDescription: Terms for using the OXP website, store, guest checkout, community features, and B2B inquiry flows.
terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.description: These terms describe the general rules for using the OXP website, store, checkout, community features, and B2B inquiry flows. They are business-appropriate general terms and should be reviewed before production launch.

sections.title: Acceptance of terms
paragraphs: By using this website, you agree to follow these terms. If you do not agree, do not use the website, place an order request, create an account, or submit content.

sections.title: About this website
paragraphs: The website presents OXP material information, products, community features, business inquiry forms, and manual order request flows. The service may change as products, availability, and operational requirements evolve.

sections.title: Account registration
paragraphs: You are responsible for providing accurate account information, keeping your password secure, and notifying us of unauthorized account use. We may suspend accounts that appear abusive, fraudulent, or in breach of these terms.

sections.title: Guest checkout
paragraphs: Guest checkout is available without creating an account where enabled. You must provide a valid email address and accurate delivery information so we can review your order request and send updates.

sections.title: Product information and availability
paragraphs: Product descriptions, pricing, availability, images, technical details, and certification references are provided for commercial review and may change. We try to keep information accurate, but errors or stock changes may occur.

sections.title: Orders and manual payment process
paragraphs: Submitting checkout information creates an order request, not an automatic paid order. Our team may review stock, delivery, tax, and payment details before confirming next steps by email.

sections.title: Shipping and delivery
paragraphs: Delivery options, timeframes, taxes, and shipping fees are calculated or confirmed during checkout and follow-up. Current storefront delivery is intended for New Zealand addresses unless otherwise stated.

sections.title: Returns/refunds statement placeholder
paragraphs: Returns, refunds, exchanges, and cancellation terms should be confirmed in the final commercial policy before launch. Until then, order-specific support will be handled by the team by email.

sections.title: B2B inquiries and review packs
paragraphs: B2B inquiries, material requests, and product development discussions are exploratory unless a separate written agreement says otherwise. Any supply, review pack, pricing, or development terms may require separate confirmation.

sections.title: Community submissions
paragraphs: Community posts, comments, profiles, uploads, and reports may be moderated, edited for operational reasons, removed, or restricted if they breach these terms or create risk for the service.

sections.title: Funding/external links disclaimer
paragraphs: Community content may refer to external websites or funding pages. We do not control those services and do not endorse, verify, or guarantee external campaigns, claims, payments, rewards, or outcomes.

sections.title: User content rules
paragraphs: Do not submit unlawful, misleading, abusive, infringing, confidential, unsafe, spam, malware, or deceptive content. You must have the rights needed to submit any text, images, files, or links you upload.

sections.title: Intellectual property
paragraphs: The website, brand assets, product content, text, layouts, images, and software are owned by OXP or its licensors unless stated otherwise. You may not copy, reuse, or commercialize them without permission.

sections.title: Prohibited conduct
paragraphs: Do not misuse the website, attempt unauthorized access, interfere with security, scrape at unreasonable scale, impersonate others, submit fraudulent orders, or use the service in a way that harms OXP, users, or service providers.

sections.title: Third-party links
paragraphs: The website may link to third-party websites, tools, maps, payment discussions, shipping providers, or community links. Those third parties are responsible for their own content, policies, and services.

sections.title: Disclaimer
paragraphs: The website is provided on an as-is and as-available basis. Material, product, sustainability, certification, and performance information should be verified for your intended use before relying on it commercially.

sections.title: Limitation of liability
paragraphs: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, OXP is not responsible for indirect, incidental, consequential, special, or punitive losses arising from use of the website, delayed availability, inaccurate submissions, or third-party services.

sections.title: Changes to terms
paragraphs: We may update these terms as the website and business operations evolve. Continued use of the website after changes are posted means you accept the updated terms.

sections.title: Contact details
paragraphs: Questions about these terms can be sent through the website contact page or to the contact email shown in the footer.

hero.title: A material born from 450 million years of natural engineering.
hero.description: Reclaimed oyster shell, refined into pellets, compress-moulded into premium objects — lighter than porcelain, stronger than ceramic, naturally safe.

whyItMatters.title: A premium material story grounded in oyster shell, not surface-level sustainability.

cards.title: Lighter Everyday Use
cards.description: OXP is developed to feel lighter in hand than traditional porcelain, making premium objects easier to live with and easier to service.

cards.title: Durability With Presence
cards.description: Pellet-based compress moulding helps deliver stronger edges, a stable body, and a refined finish that feels substantial without heaviness.

cards.title: Natural Health Positioning
cards.description: The oyster shell origin gives the material a more natural, mineral-led story for brands speaking to health-conscious consumers.

stats: Oyster shell sourcing, pellet refining, and finished-object making are kept in one coherent material narrative.
The material story supports conscious premium positioning for both B2C products and B2B programs.
Documentation and traceability are prepared to support sampling, evaluation, and brand storytelling.

materialStory.title: From oyster shell to compress-moulded object.

steps.title: Oyster Shell Collection
steps.description: Discarded oyster shells are sourced from South Korean coastal operations and sorted for material recovery.

steps.title: Pellet Refining
steps.description: Shell mineral content is cleaned, milled, and refined into OXP pellets prepared for controlled production.

steps.title: Compress Moulding
steps.description: The pellets are formed under pressure into stable, durable shapes for premium tableware and object programs.

steps.title: Finished Objects
steps.description: The final result is a family of lighter, stronger, design-led products ready for retail, hospitality, and collaboration.

items.title: Homeware Objects
items.description: Trays, accents, and display pieces that carry the shell story into the home.

items.title: Brand Collaborations
items.description: Co-developed launches, gifting lines, and limited premium editions.

businessPillars.title: Terraf operates through three interconnected functions — material, manufacturing, and restoration.

pillars.name: Terrafin
pillars.description: The material function. The XP Material Family includes OXP as the current oyster-shell line and CXP as a separate Terrafin family line; MXP is not currently introduced on this website.

pillars.name: Terrafactory
pillars.description: The manufacturing function. Micro-factories positioned close to biomass sources convert regional waste into Terrafin material on-site, reducing transport and supporting local economies.

pillars.name: Terraforming
pillars.description: The restoration function. Forest management, water harvesting, and oasis projects that return carbon to the ground and restore functional ecosystems at the landscape level.

openSourceLegacy.title: We did not invent — we copied nature's source code.
openSourceLegacy.intro: Four natural authors wrote the blueprint for what Terraf builds today.

authors.author: Olefin
authors.legacy: Insects and plants established olefins as the dominant structural material across evolution — proven across 400 million years of clinical trials.

authors.author: Ancient Lignin
authors.legacy: Carboniferous forests locked atmospheric carbon into durable woody biomass — the original carbon sequestration technology.

authors.author: Elephant
authors.legacy: The elephant reshapes entire landscapes through movement and grazing — a model for restoration at ecosystem scale.

authors.author: Wasp
authors.legacy: The wasp was the first to construct with biomass composites — building precise, durable structures from plant fibers and saliva.

materialFamily.title: Product-driven Bio-CCUS: the carbon lockdown cycle.
materialFamily.intro: Terrafin frames its XP materials as product-driven carbon lockdown pathways. OXP is the current oyster-shell material on this site, CXP is a separate Terrafin carbon-product line, and MXP is not currently introduced on this website.

diagram.title: Terrafin carbon lockdown cycle
diagram.alt: Terrafin diagram showing carbon emission, carbon flux, and carbon lockdown pathways across OXP, CXP, BXP, shells, biomass, bio-char, and fossil fuels.
diagram.caption: Red marks carbon emission, green marks carbon flux, and purple marks product-driven carbon lockdown.

lines.name: Oyster Shell XP
lines.description: The current OXP material line converts recovered oyster shells into premium material products through the shell-carbonate pathway.

lines.name: Carbon XP
lines.description: CXP is another Terrafin product line connected to biomass, farm, forest, and bio-char carbon-lockdown routes.

lines.name: Mineral XP
lines.description: MXP is not currently introduced on this website.

finalCta.title: Bring OXP into your next tableware, pellet, or concept program.
finalCta.description: Use the store for product inspiration, or contact the team for B2B supply and development.

origin.title: Origin Story
origin.body: OXP begins with discarded oyster shell waste. The shells are collected, purified, refined into mineral-rich pellets, and compression-moulded into premium products.

properties.weight: Lower-density targets depend on final formulation, moulding, and product geometry.
properties.strength: Durability should be confirmed against the final product shape and use case.
properties.absorption: Water resistance data is being prepared and depends on final formulation and testing.
properties.antibacterial: Food-contact or hygiene claims should be supported by approved documents.
properties.grip: Grip and slip resistance should be checked for the final surface finish.
properties.otr: Barrier and breathability data should be reviewed against the intended application.

process.step1: Collection: oyster shell waste is recovered and sorted from coastal processing streams.
process.step2: Thermal purification: shells are sterilized between 200-700°C and mineral tones are developed.
process.step3: Pelletizing: purified shell minerals are refined into OXP pellets for stable batch production.
process.step4: Compression moulding: pellets are formed into lightweight, high-impact products and surfaces.

intro.title: Oyster shell pellets engineered for lighter, stronger, more natural premium objects.
intro.description: This page focuses on the OXP material system: oyster shell recovery, pellet refining, compress moulding, and the technical story required for review.

proofPoints.title: Material proof without overclaiming.
proofPoints.description: OXP is presented as a material platform under active testing and client review, with claims tied to available evidence.

cards.title: Recycled oyster shell source
cards.description: Built around recovered oyster shell input from coastal waste streams.

cards.title: Lower plastic dependency
cards.description: Designed to reduce reliance on conventional plastic in selected applications.

cards.title: Compression moulding compatible
cards.description: Developed for compression moulding workflows and product prototyping.

cards.title: Product and tableware applications

technicalDownloads.emptyDescription: Final PDFs and client-approved documents will be added after upload or publication approval.

comparison.title: OXP compared with conventional materials
comparison.description: A cautious comparison for early material review. Final suitability depends on formulation and testing.

rows.label: Material source
rows.oxp: Recovered oyster shell with binder system depending on formulation.
rows.plastic: Fossil-derived or recycled polymer depending on grade.
rows.ceramic: Mineral clay fired at high temperature.
rows.paper: Wood or fibre pulp with coatings depending on application.

rows.label: Weight
rows.oxp: Depends on grade and filler ratio.

rows.label: Durability
rows.oxp: Depends on final formulation and testing.
rows.plastic: Varies widely by polymer and wall thickness.
rows.ceramic: Hard but can chip or break.

rows.label: Heat resistance
rows.oxp: Depends on final formulation and testing.

rows.label: End-of-life
rows.oxp: Depends on binder system, local recycling, and client requirements.
rows.plastic: Depends on resin type and recycling access.
rows.ceramic: Long-lived but difficult to recycle at scale.
rows.paper: Often recyclable or compostable only when coatings allow.

rows.label: Best application
rows.oxp: Premium objects, review packs, tableware concepts, and B2B product development.
rows.plastic: Lightweight mass production and flexible formats.

comparison.disclaimer: Some material specifications and certifications may depend on final formulation, application, and client testing requirements.

items.question: How durable is OXP tableware?
items.answer: OXP products are designed around a premium shell composite story with low absorption, repeatable finish quality, and hospitality-minded durability. Exact performance still depends on the specific form factor and production batch.

items.question: Can I order for hospitality or design projects?
items.answer: Yes. The store supports direct B2C discovery, but products that fit hospitality, retail, or design-project use can route into bulk enquiry and review pack workflows through the existing B2B lead flow.

items.question: What happens if a product is sold out or made to order?
items.answer: Availability states are surfaced per product. If a batch is sold out, the product page will steer you toward restock updates, material requests, or a direct project enquiry instead of a dead-end purchase path.

items.question: Are shipping and tax fully calculated yet?
items.answer: Shipping and tax are estimates in the cart and order request flow. Our team will confirm final details by email.

The team will route your request to the right review path.
Uncertain claims and certifications remain pending until verified.

cartSidebar.emptyDescription: Add an OXP piece to begin your order request.
cartSidebar.guestCheckoutHint: You can check out without creating an account. We'll use your email to send order updates.
cartSidebar.signInDialogDescription: Sign in with the same OXP account used across the community.

cartPage.emptyDescription: Add an OXP product to start a guest-friendly cart. If you sign in later, the current cart will merge into your account.
cartPage.title: Review your OXP selections
cartPage.freeShippingNote: Shipping and tax are estimates. Our team will confirm the final details by email.
cartPage.signInDialogDescription: Sign in with the same OXP account used across the community.
cartPage.shippingAtCheckoutNote: Shipping is calculated at checkout once your New Zealand postcode and delivery method are selected.
cartPage.noAccountRequired: No account required. You can submit the order request as a guest.
cartPage.guestCheckoutHint: You can check out without creating an account. We'll use your email to send order updates.

cartQuantity.addedMaximumAvailable: Only {count} available. Your cart was updated to the maximum.

checkout.emptyDescription: Add an OXP product before continuing to an order request.
checkout.title: Review and submit order request
checkout.description: Online payment is not available yet. Submit your request and our team will confirm stock, shipping, tax, and payment instructions by email.
checkout.confirmationNote: Your order request will be reviewed manually. Online payment is not available yet.
checkout.nzOnlyNotice: We currently deliver within New Zealand only.
checkout.emailHelper: We'll send the order confirmation to this email.
checkout.guestCheckoutDisabled: Guest checkout is currently disabled. Sign in before submitting this order request.
checkout.storeDisabledDescription: The store is not accepting order requests right now. Please contact the team for urgent requests.
checkout.addressSearchPlaceholder: Start typing a New Zealand street address
checkout.addressLookupUnavailable: Address lookup unavailable, enter address manually.
checkout.ruralDelivery: This is a rural delivery address
checkout.shippingNeedsPostcode: Enter a New Zealand postcode to see delivery methods.
checkout.shippingUnavailable: Shipping options unavailable, please check postcode.
checkout.shippingMethodRequired: Select a delivery method before submitting the order request.

express.label: Priority NZ delivery
express.description: Faster tracked delivery within New Zealand

ordersPage.title: Order History
ordersPage.emptyDescription: Browse the OXP collection and submit your first order request.
ordersPage.submittedTitle: Your order request has been submitted.
ordersPage.submittedDescription: Our team will review stock, shipping, and payment details, then contact you by email.

productCard.requestSample: Request a review pack or spec pack

productDetail.defaultAvailability: Availability confirmed with the latest store sync.
productDetail.pageFallbackDescription: Review the OXP product specification, availability, and enquiry options.
productDetail.pageErrorDescription: The product page could not be loaded from the API. You can still browse the store or contact the team directly.
productDetail.soldOutMessage: This batch is sold out. Request a restock update or a review pack and the team can guide you to the next release.
productDetail.bulkOrderMessage: This product is better suited to hospitality, bulk, or project-led ordering. Use the enquiry CTA for MOQ, lead time, and customization support.
productDetail.conversionTitle: Move from product discovery into a real project or order flow
productDetail.bulkEnquiryDescription: For restaurant groups, design studios, and hospitality buyers reviewing MOQ and lead time.
productDetail.requestSampleDescription: Review OXP finish, density, and care notes before a larger commitment.
productDetail.materialReviewDescription: Explore the oyster-shell material system behind this product and its sustainability story.
productDetail.oxpMaterialLine: Made with recovered oyster shell OXP material.
productDetail.nzDeliveryBadge: Designed in Korea / New Zealand delivery
productDetail.glanceTitle: The essentials before you request the order
productDetail.glanceDescription: Key product, material, and delivery details for quick review.
productDetail.whyOxpDescription: OXP brings recovered shell material into considered objects with a refined surface character and a credible material story for homes, hospitality, interiors, and design collaborations.
productDetail.bestForTitle: Use cases that fit this object
productDetail.certificationsOnRequest: Certification information is available on request for trade and hospitality projects.
productDetail.reassuranceShippingCalculated: Shipping is calculated at checkout from your postcode and selected delivery method.
productDetail.reassuranceEmailConfirmation: Order confirmation and next steps are sent by email.
productDetail.reassuranceTradeQuote: For trade or bulk orders, request a project quote.
productDetail.faqOysterShellQuestion: Is this made from oyster shell?
productDetail.faqOysterShellAnswer: Yes. This product is made with Terrafin OXP material, a material line that uses recovered oyster shell.
productDetail.faqShippingQuestion: Do you ship outside New Zealand?
productDetail.faqShippingAnswer: Not yet. The store currently supports delivery within New Zealand only.
productDetail.faqSampleQuestion: Can I request a review pack?
productDetail.faqSampleAvailableAnswer: Yes. Use the material request option on this page and the team will follow up by email.
productDetail.faqSampleUnavailableAnswer: Review packs are not enabled for this product right now. You can still contact the team for project guidance.
productDetail.faqB2bQuestion: Can this be ordered for hospitality or B2B projects?
productDetail.faqB2bAvailableAnswer: Yes. Use the bulk enquiry option for MOQ, lead time, and project requirements.
productDetail.faqB2bUnavailableAnswer: For hospitality or B2B requirements, contact the team and include your quantity and timeline.

layout.title: OXP Community
layout.description: A place for designers and makers to share OXP product ideas, material experiments, and sustainable living concepts.

auth.title: OXP Access
auth.description: Sign in to shopping, post ideas, follow makers, and join the conversation around OXP material applications.
auth.emailHelper: This email will be used to sign in.
auth.name: Full name
auth.guestHint: You can browse public posts without signing in.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.description: Enter the email address on your OXP account and we will send a secure reset link if the account exists.
forgotPassword.successDescription: If an account exists for that email address, a password reset link has been sent. The link may expire, so use the latest email you receive.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.

resetPassword.title: Create a new password
resetPassword.description: Choose a new password for your OXP account. Use the latest reset link from your email.
resetPassword.successDescription: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in with the new password.
resetPassword.missingDescription: The reset link is missing required information. Request a new link and use the latest email you receive.
resetPassword.invalidResetLink: This reset link has expired or is not valid. Request a new password reset email.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.

emailVerification.verifiedDescription: Your OXP account email is confirmed. You can continue signing in and using account features.
emailVerification.expiredDescription: For security, email verification links expire. Sign in and request a new verification email from your account.
emailVerification.invalidTitle: This verification link is not valid.
emailVerification.invalidDescription: The link may have already been used, changed, or copied incorrectly. Sign in and request a new verification email if your account is still unverified.
emailVerification.signInToRequest: Sign in to request a new email

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.emailTaken: This email is already registered. Try signing in instead.
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.validation: Please check the highlighted fields and try again.

report.descriptionPlaceholder: Optional details for the moderation team.

feed.title: Design ideas from the OXP community
feed.description: Browse product concepts, material and craft experiments, partnership ideas, and sustainable living discussions.
feed.resultsDescription: These posts match your search and can help you explore related OXP ideas.
feed.emptyDescription: The community is ready. Share the first OXP idea to get the conversation started.
feed.noResults: Try a different keyword or browse the latest community posts instead.
feed.requestTooFast: Requests are coming too fast. Please wait a moment before trying again.

form.createDescription: Describe your design idea, what product OXP material could be used for, and why it would be valuable.
form.editDescription: Update the title, content, attachments, or funding link for your design idea.
form.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Oyster-shell tableware set for boutique hotels
form.fundingPlaceholder: GoFundMe or Kickstarter link for this design
form.contentPlaceholder: Describe your design idea, what product could OXP material be used for, and why it would be valuable.
form.excerptPlaceholder: Optional summary for cards and previews.
form.excerptHint: Leave blank to auto-generate an excerpt from the editor content.
form.imagesHint: Optional. Upload up to 12 safe files, including images, documents, archives, and common 3D files.
form.pendingSuccess: Your idea was submitted and is waiting for approval.
form.updatePending: Your update was saved and is waiting for approval.
form.titleMax: Title must be 100 characters or fewer.
form.contentMin: Content must be at least 20 characters.
form.contentMax: Content must be {max} characters or fewer.
form.excerptMax: Excerpt must be 500 characters or fewer.
form.imagesMax: You can upload up to 12 attachments.

richEditor.coverImageHint: Drop an image here or click to upload.

orderLookup.title: Track an order request
orderLookup.description: Enter the order number and confirmation email used at checkout. Guest customers can review order status, payment state, items, and delivery details without creating an account.
orderLookup.lookupFailed: We could not find a guest order matching those details.
orderLookup.validationRequired: Enter both the order number and confirmation email.
orderLookup.secureLinkNotice: This order was loaded from your secure guest order link.
orderLookup.emptyDescription: Use the lookup form to see the latest order stage, payment status, product list, and shipping summary.
orderLookup.emailNotice: Order updates are sent to the confirmation email. Contact the team if the email address is no longer available.

guestOrderSubmitted.title: Your guest order request has been submitted.
guestOrderSubmitted.description: We will send the order confirmation and next steps to your email. Keep this page link if you want to revisit the request without an account.
guestOrderSubmitted.invalidTitle: This guest order link is not available.
guestOrderSubmitted.invalidDescription: Guest order requests can only be viewed with the secure link sent after submission.
guestOrderSubmitted.nextStepEmail: Our team reviews stock and order details, then confirms by email.
guestOrderSubmitted.nextStepManualPayment: Payment remains manual. Online payment is not available yet.
guestOrderSubmitted.nextStepNzDelivery: Delivery is available within New Zealand only.
